body.u: I hope to get mariedmarried and have two children. I would liketolike to get a steady job some where where they pay a nice wage from about £80 to about £120 a week. I would like to be a lorry driver if not I would like to work with animals as a farmer or I don’t mind being a I don’t rellyreally know what I would like to do you’re a living for the next 45 years it’s a long time.

Looking back from 68 years old. Well I made it to 68 I sopposesuppose I was one of the lucky ones I was working in a factory when I was 16 years old. When I got to 23 years I took my HGV Lisenslicence a parstpassed the 2nd time. I was driving for two years when I got married I had two children thay married. Know I am a granddad. All them years of work. Is it worth it for this life. Most of the people i know are dead know and there rest well now know about the rest.

Looking back I havendhaven't had totoo bad a life you know but I could have made it better but still its to late in life now. And all you can do in think about it and fellfeel sorry for yourself. I have a nice wife lovely grandchildren and a nice house it cost £5,600 and now they are moveingmoving {us a} and knokingknocking the old place down. A man workesworks all his life her retiersretires and they wont to get him in to an old peoples home and knock down his home. ItsIt's just not worth it. Life is it
